misc: Appreciates the thoughtful course designs of Kosti Kuronen who passed away in 2024
biography: Ofri, a golfer hailing from Golf Pirkkala and residing in Tampere, Finland, is known for his thoughtful approach to the game. His peers describe him as a reserved player who is nevertheless very passionate about golf, especially about the technical aspects of course design. He deeply appreciates the work of the late Kosti Kuronen, whose designs demand precision and strategy.

As Ofri prepares for Hector Trophée 2026, it marks his fourth appearance in this esteemed tournament. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor trophy have eluded him thus far, Ofri's dedication and meticulous preparation suggest that he remains a strong contender in future competitions. Golfing fans should keep an eye on Ofri during the 2026 edition of the Hector Trophée.
